docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLELLI, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT SHAO, GRACE
REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL & SUBMITTED
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-06-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-30-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-19-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FRANK VILLELLI IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT GRACE SHAO IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $3980 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE AUG 19TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE, OR THE AGREEMENT IS FRUSTRATED. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $155) SERVED APR-18-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHAO, GRACE
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLELLI, FRANK
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**GRANTED**
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,687.50 FILED BY VILLELLI, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT SHAO, GRACE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLELLI, FRANK

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
